developer_response.body:
Hey bacongaming123
We're glad you want to enhance the frog hands Steve experience! 
Search for the Peanut Button website and send us a message or an email and let's see if it works out

reviews.review_title: Why my hands are frog in vr
Gives you exactly what it promises!
reviews.review_description:
This game was made in a Game Jam, and it's a totally fun game that gives you exactly what it promises: Frog Hands. Your hands are two frogs which you wield like six shooters, and you use them to catch as many mosquitoes as you can in three minutes. Fire up those tongues, hop-along! It's time to play Frog Hands Steve!
Watch my gameplay here: https://youtu.be/QSB2N7OGq00
Thanks for liking, subscribing, and watching StoneToaster Gaming!
Steve eats the frogs after each round and replaces them with new ones to eat after they get big and chonky. Steve is a monster
Good frog licking/shooting interaction, it felt sticky and correct. Who is Steve?
